subcodes.first_line: O My Afnán! Upon thee be My glory and My loving-kindness! The letter from Jinab-i-'Andalib - upon him be My glory - which was sent to thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا افنانی علیک بهائی و عنایتی نامه جناب عندلیب علیه بهائی که بانجناب ارسال
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @the power of words; of speech
